LanguageData.AM_DecomposingWeapons.label: 拆解槍械
LanguageData.AM_DecomposingWeapons.description: 將槍械拆卸成武器零件
LanguageData.AM_DecomposingWeaponsI.label: 拆解精密槍械
LanguageData.AM_DecomposingWeaponsI.description: 將精密槍械拆卸成多個武器零件
LanguageData.AM_DisassembleHeavyArmor.label: 拆解重型裝甲
LanguageData.AM_DisassembleHeavyArmor.description: 把重型裝甲拆解為防彈裝甲板與纖維布料
LanguageData.AM_DisassembleLightArmor.label: 拆解輕質裝甲
LanguageData.AM_DisassembleLightArmor.description: 把輕質裝甲拆解為防彈裝甲板與纖維布料
LanguageData.AM_DisassemblePolyethylenePlate.label: 拆解聚乙烯防彈插板
LanguageData.AM_DisassemblePolyethylenePlate.descript: 把聚乙烯裝甲板上的芳綸布料層拆下來，以回收珍貴的芳綸
LanguageData.AM_DisassemblePolyethylenePlate.jobStrin: 正在拆解聚乙烯防彈插板
